store.name: Minami
store.run_say: I go for a run in the park...
Running is good for what I have.

say: All work and no play makes [hero.name] a dull boy.

objects.what: And then Minami comes bustling in, filling the air with noise and chatter.
This...is...so...cool!
She practically bounces her way around the practice room.
Threading between the instruments and gear, she comes dangerously close to causing some serious damage as she does so.
You said you were in a band, big bro.
But I always thought it was one of those with trumpets, tubas and all that shit.
This is like a REAL band though.
And you're like a real rock star too!
I feel Kleio fix me with a glance and a sneer before she even opens her mouth to speak.
Hey, Loverboy - who's little miss sugar rush here?
At the sound of her voice, Minami rounds on Kleio with such speed the other girl actually recoils in surprise.
Oh wow - you're like some kind of serious rock chick, aren't you?
I bet you don't take shit from ANYONE!
Kleio looks baffled by Minami's words, slowly realising that she's being complimented.
Well...I guess...I guess I kind of am.
And you with the drums!
Anna jumps on her drum stool and squeaks in alarm as she becomes the centre of Minami's attention.

Yeah...but, that's kind of the idea...

Otherwise we're not going to get fuck all done for her sticking her nose into everything.

Normally I'd be more than flattered by Minami wanting to see me play.
But it feels like she's been under my feet since the moment she arrived.
What I really need right now is the chance to let off some serious steam.
On top of that, she's my little sister, and it's not fair to inflict her on the others either.
No, Minami - you need to get your ass out of here.
I'll make it up to you, okay?
You can come to the very next gig that we play - how's that?
Minami's face darkens, and she's now very definitely sulking.
Aww...but I...
No, I'm not discussing it with you.
Get out of here!
Okay, okay - I'm going already!
As soon as the door closes behind her, I look at the others and shake my head.
Really, guys - I'm sorry you had to see that.
She's a good kid, but you have to be firm with her.
Anna looks bemused at this, blinking and shaking her head.
What do you mean, Mike?
She wanted to hear you play, that's all!
Nah, Loverboy's right, Anna.
You gotta put your foot down with kids like her!
I could point out that Minami's not that much younger than Kleio herself.
But I prefer to have her on my side of the argument for once.

She's pretty much like rubber - she'll bounce back quickly.
We press on with the practice and the incident's soon forgotten.
Afterwards, I feel suitably refreshed and like it was worth the effort to kick Minami out.
Sure, she keeps on sulking on the ride home.
But her mood brightens almost as soon as something comes along to distract her again.
Hello, Mike.
Hi.
Nice to see you Mike.
Hi.
Do you have some time to talk?

We practice together.
Let's watch a movie together.
We watch Nice Doctors Meet Los Angeles.

Urgh...that was a massive disappointment - total waste of time!
Wanna come over for a little fun?
Sure.
I've been looking forward to getting Emma alone all evening.
In fact, it's been the only thing on my mind the whole time.
But on the way back to my place she started to go quiet.
And by the time we're in my bedroom, I can see she's preoccupied too.
Only I'm not sure that she's obsessing about what happens now for the same reason!

Are you feeling okay?

The more time that passes, the more that matter goes from unimportant to pretty urgent.
And then there's that weird noise that I keep hearing too.

Finally I can't stand it any longer.
I pick up the phone and dial Shiori's extension.

Shiori?

objects.what: Oh my goodness!

And I'm happy not to press the issue with her.

So long as you don't make a habit of it, okay?
